message:
Command `# Log output stopped at GRT completion. Process still running (CPU active).
# It's probably doing antenna repair (arc repair) internally within the GRT step, before writing state_out.
# Or it moved to a new step and buffered output. Wait.
sleep 300
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
wc -l /tmp/pnr_v4.log
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Log output stopped at GRT completion. Process still running (CPU active).
# It's probably doing antenna repair (arc repair) internally within the GRT step, before writing state_out.
# Or it moved to a new step and buffered output. Wait.
sleep 300
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8

tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4.log
